text: I feel a sense of observer’s anticipation here. The first image, with its clean glass and modern interior, gives an air of order—a place where function triumphs over chaos. Yet the angled view disturbs this stability, reminding me how perspective shifts meaning. In the second image, bright colors and bold letters shout R+D, signifying innovation and inquiry into the nature of human and machine relations. Surrounded by questions and displays, I feel curiosity and a touch of awe at the perpetual evolution of thought and technology. It’s exciting and slightly disorienting, like being on the edge of new ideas.
